name: 08-reverse-dns-extension
description: Extension capability id com.example.product:custom-op using the reverse-DNS namespace grammar from ADR-0005. Schema accepts this id because com.example.product has two or more DNS labels. Qualifier keys under the extension namespace (mode=enhanced) are freeform.
notes: Policy #11 (no-unknown-extension-capability) evaluates 'warn' by default against this fixture because com.example.product is not in the default extension-namespace allowlist for v0.1 (only mcp is). Under the strict profile, Policy #11 evaluates 'deny'. Consumers that wish to trust com.example.product capabilities must explicitly add the namespace to their allowlist.
